title: Builder's Palette
description: Mod that adds plenty of decoration blocks such as bricks, road marking blocks etc.
body:
CookieCraft Builder's Palette...
 

This mod is next gen of Building Blocks.

It is mean to be better than it's predecessor.

You will be able to download both.
 

I'm developing this mod to make you be able to reach the heights of creativity with various blocks like:
 - concrete blocks

 - tile blocks

 - brick blocks

 - woodwork

 - etc.
  
**Is there anything you would like to see added to this mod? Or maybe you have found a bug? Join our discord and get into our community!**
[discord](https://discord.gg/YqFxSDJkPJ)

**For more specific info or to check on upcoming updates check out our website at:**
[https://cookiecraftmods.com](https://cookiecraftmods.com/)
 

Thanks for downloading, have fun!
